description.ko: 기하학적 질서가 계산된 단색 파편의 디지털 폭발로 붕괴되는 체계적 혼돈에 대한 연구입니다.
description.en: A study of systematic chaos where geometric order collapses into a calculated digital explosion of monochrome fragments.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Recursive Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian geometric fractal suspended in a sterile #FFFFFF void, undergoing a systematic data collapse. The structure splits into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards that rotate in a complex, mathematical spiral. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slice through the composition at 45-degree angles. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes intersect with scanlines. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the cold elegance of architectural entropy.
